heart.dataset_description: UCI Heart Disease dataset. Predicts presence of heart disease (binary). All features are numeric or integer-encoded categorical (cp=chest pain type 0-3, thal=thalassemia 0-3, slope=ST slope 0-2, restecg=resting ECG 0-2, fbs=fasting blood sugar binary, exang=exercise angina binary, sex=binary, ca=number of vessels 0-3). No string categorical columns — all already numeric. No ID columns.
heart.notes: Dataset domain: medical/cardiology. All features appear numeric — some (cp, thal, slope, restecg, ca) are actually categorical but integer-encoded. Tree-based models handle integer-coded categories natively. Ordinal/label encoding is fine — no need to one-hot encode.
